Latest News & Events

09 January 2026

Indonesia applies OG-IDN macroeconomic model in policy dialogue on budget reallocation

Indonesia applied the OG-IDN overlapping generations macroeconomic model in a policy dialogue examining alternative public expenditure reallocation options under fiscal constraints.

OG-Core
Indonesia
17 November 2025

Project Launch and Initial OG-Core Training Workshop in Ethiopia

Strengthening Ethiopia’s Economic Planning Capacity Through Advanced Policy Simulation Tools.

OG-Core
Ethiopia
20 June 2025

National Workshop on Advanced Training on Macro-Fiscal Modelling and Forecasting for Tunisia

The United Nations, through UN DESA and ESCWA, organized a national workshop in Tunisia focused on advanced training in macro-fiscal modelling and forecasting.

WEFM
Tunisia
20 May 2025

Exploring the OG-Core Model for Long-Term Policy Planning

Development Policy Seminar showcases real-world applications from Indonesia, the Philippines, and South Africa.

OG-Core
United Nations Headquaters
08 May 2025

Advance Training on the Climate, Land, Energy and Water systems (CLEWs) framework for Lao PDR

Strengthening Integrated Planning in Lao PDR through CLEWs Training and Collaboration.

Clews
Lao PDR
18 April 2025

Introductory CLEWs Workshop in Zambia

CLEWs Workshop Empowers Sustainable Planning in Zambia.

Zambia
